data.text:
Now I have enough context. Let me make the changes to both files.

**IntegrityPanel.svelte** needs:
1. Section: `bg-accent-load/10` → `bg-bg-surface`, `border-accent-load/30` → `border-border-line`
2. Header border: `border-accent-load/30` → `border-border-line`
3. UL dividers: `divide-accent-load/30` → `divide-border-line`
4. Button hover: `hover:bg-accent-load/10` → `hover:bg-bg-canvas`
5. Inner UL: `bg-accent-load/5` → `bg-bg-canvas`
6. ID badge: use status CSS vars (badge-status-blocked)
7. Copy suggestion button: use status CSS vars
8. Missing dep snippet: use status CSS vars

**D3Graph.svelte** needs:
1. Container div: add `bg-bg-canvas dark:bg-dark-bg-canvas`
2. Node text: change `fill='currentColor'` → use `fill-fg-muted dark:fill-dark-fg-muted` class
3. Node circles: already have `accent-lever/fulcrum`, add `accent-load` for root nodes (no dependsOn)

127			// Drag
128			const drag = d3
129				.drag<SVGGElement, SimNode>()
130				.on('start', (event, d) => {
131					if (!event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0.3).restart()
132					d.fx = d.x
133					d.fy = d.y
134				})
135				.on('drag', (event, d) => {
136					d.fx = event.x
137					d.fy = event.y
138				})
139				.on('end', (event, d) => {
140					if (!event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0)
141					d.fx = null
142					d.fy = null
143				})
144	
145			nodeGroup.call(drag)
146	
147			// Tooltip on hover
148			nodeGroup
149				.on('mouseenter', (event: MouseEvent, d) => {
150					const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
151					tooltipNode = d
152					tooltipX = event.clientX - rect.left + 14
153					tooltipY = event.clientY - rect.top - 10
154				})
155				.on('mousemove', (event: MouseEvent) => {
156					const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
157					tooltipX = event.clientX - rect.left + 14
158					tooltipY = event.clientY - rect.top - 10
159				})
160				.on('mouseleave', () => {
161					tooltipNode = null
162				})
163	
164			// Tick
165			simulation.on('tick', () => {
166				linkSel
167					.attr('x1', (d: any) => d.source.x ?? 0)
168					.attr('y1', (d: any) => d.source.y ?? 0)
169					.attr('x2', (d: any) => d.target.x ?? 0)
170					.attr('y2', (d: any) => d.target.y ?? 0)
171	
172				nodeGroup.attr('transform', (d) => `translate(${d.x ?? 0},${d.y ?? 0})`)
173			})
174	
175			return () => {
176				simulation.stop()
177				tooltipNode = null
178			}
179		})

data.text:
Commit succeeded. The bead is complete:

**IntegrityPanel.svelte:**
- Section card: `bg-bg-surface` + `border-border-line` (was `bg-accent-load/10` + `border-accent-load/30`)
- Header and UL dividers: `border-border-line` throughout
- Hover states: `hover:bg-bg-canvas`
- Inner list background: `bg-bg-canvas`
- Issue ID badges, copy suggestion button, missing dep snippet: `badge-status-blocked` CSS var class for status-colored indicators

**D3Graph.svelte:**
- Container div: `bg-bg-canvas dark:bg-dark-bg-canvas`
- Node circles: `accent-load` (amber) for root nodes (no dependsOn), `accent-lever` (blue) for dependent nodes, `accent-fulcrum` stroke throughout
- Node text labels: `fill-fg-muted dark:fill-dark-fg-muted` (was `fill: currentColor` / fg-ink)
